# TYM Agency — Custom Web Development & Local SEO in Trichy, Tamil Nadu
> TYM Agency engineers high-performance React websites and algorithmic local SEO systems for businesses in Trichy, Madurai, and across Tamil Nadu.

## About
TYM Agency is a child brand of The Youth Mint, based in Tiruchirappalli (Trichy), Tamil Nadu. We build custom React web architectures, headless e-commerce stores, and Google Maps local SEO domination systems. Every project is hand-coded — no templates, no page builders, no WordPress.

## Services
- Custom Web Development (React, Vite, Node.js)
- Local SEO & Google Business Profile Optimization
- Google Maps Proximity Ranking
- Headless E-Commerce Storefronts
- Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) for AI Search
- Internet Marketing & Digital Strategy

## Service Areas
- Trichy (Tiruchirappalli), Tamil Nadu
- Madurai, Tamil Nadu
- Tamil Nadu Statewide
- Pan-India Remote

## Portfolio (13 Deployed Systems)
- Sabesh Fashions (Madurai) — Local SEO #1 Ranking
- TYM Hardware Store — E-Commerce
- TYM Events 2026 — Event Portfolio
- TYM Jewels — Jewelry Storefront
- Multicuisine Restaurant — Restaurant Website
- SKP Realty — Real Estate Portal
- Arunagiri Estates — Real Estate
- Tier1 Silk / Kavaeri's Restaurant — Fashion & Restaurant
- David Jacob D Portfolio — Developer Portfolio
- Elias Ebenesar Portfolio — Developer Portfolio
- Mackrine Ruth Portfolio — Developer Portfolio
- SKP Portfolio — Developer Portfolio
- Thamizh Nigazhvugal — Event Portfolio
